title: 14-language localization support
features: Full localization support for 14 languages: German, English, Spanish (ES/LA), French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese (BR), Russian, Thai, Turkish, Chinese (Simplified)
Language selector in the navigation bar — persists across sessions via localStorage
Home page section titles, descriptions, and character names fully localized
All entity names, descriptions, and display fields localized across 19 categories
Encounter monster names now use localized names from game data
fixes: Encounter monster names displayed as PascalCase-split English instead of localized names
Tea Master, Dense Vegetation, and Spiraling Whirlpool events now resolve description templates correctly
api_changes: All API endpoints now accept `?lang=` query parameter (default: `eng`)
New endpoint: GET /api/languages — returns available languages with display names
New endpoint: GET /api/translations — returns translation maps for UI strings
Cache-Control headers on all API GET responses (5-minute browser cache)
